config.moldraw.option.enabled.tooltip: Master switch to enable or disable the entire mod
config.moldraw.option.onlyShowOnShift: Only show drawings when pressing Shift
config.moldraw.option.onlyShowOnShift.to: When enabled, molecular structures and alloy charts will only appear when holding Shift
config.moldraw.option.colors.tooltip: Display element symbols in their standard CPK colors
Use GregTech material colors instead of standard CPK colors when available
config.moldraw.option.defaultColor.toolt: The color code used for elements without a specific color (e.g., §e for yellow)
config.moldraw.option.showMolecules.tool: Enable or disable the display of molecular structures in tooltips
config.moldraw.option.moleculeScale.tool: Adjust the size of molecule drawings (10-50)
config.moldraw.option.spinMolecules.tool: Molecules will rotate automatically when enabled
config.moldraw.option.spinSpeedMultiplie: Adjust the rotation speed of molecules
config.moldraw.option.showAlloys.tooltip: Enable or disable the display of alloy composition pie charts
config.moldraw.option.pieChartRadius: Radius of the alloy composition pie chart
config.moldraw.option.pieChartRadius.too: Adjust the size of alloy pie charts (25-50)
config.moldraw.option.recursive: Recursively decompose alloys into their constituent elements
config.moldraw.option.recursive.tooltip: When enabled, shows the final elemental composition instead of intermediate alloys
config.moldraw.option.partsByMass: Show percentages of alloy components by mass
config.moldraw.option.partsByMass.toolti: When enabled, displays percentages by mass; otherwise by molar ratio
config.moldraw.option.showMoleculePrevie: Display a preview of the molecule in the MOL converter GUI
config.moldraw.option.previewX.tooltip: Horizontal position of the molecule preview (0-1000)
config.moldraw.option.previewY.tooltip: Vertical position of the molecule preview (0-1000)
moldraw.gui.mol_converter.title: MOL Converter
moldraw.gui.config.title: MolDraw Configuration
